summary: Iteration 141: Echo Concierge Liability Filter + Spa Schedule Intelligence - All 40 backend tests passed. Tested 5 liability endpoints (/rules, /scan, /sanitize, /log, /summary) with 23 test cases covering all 6 rule categories (privacy, diagnostic, defamation, harassment, guarantee, opinion). Tested 5 spa-schedule endpoints (/gaps, /premium-slots, /upsell, /rebalance, /recommendations) with 8 test cases. Verified severity escalation (high blocks save), sanitization idempotency, audit log stores metadata only (no raw text), and exposure_score formula (premium*3 + non_premium). All regression tests pass.

verified_features.LIABILITY_rules_6_categories: PASS - GET /api/echo-concierge/liability/rules returns 6 categories (privacy, diagnostic, defamation, harassment, guarantee, opinion) each with rule_count > 0 and severity_policy
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_clean_text: PASS - POST /scan with clean text returns severity='none', finding_count=0, ok_to_save=true
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_credit_card: PASS - POST /scan with CC '4111-1111-1111-1111' detects severity='high', category='privacy', ok_to_save=false, requires_manager_approval=true
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_email: PASS - POST /scan with email detects 'privacy' category at medium severity
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_ssn: PASS - POST /scan with SSN '123-45-6789' detects severity='high', category='privacy'
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_drunk: PASS - POST /scan with 'drunk' detects severity='high' (diagnostic category - intoxication claim)
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_stole: PASS - POST /scan with 'stole' detects severity='high', category='defamation'
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_scammer: PASS - POST /scan with 'scammer' detects severity='high', category='defamation'
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_allergic: PASS - POST /scan with 'allergic to peanuts' detects severity='high', category='diagnostic'
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_medication: PASS - POST /scan with 'on medication' detects severity='high', category='diagnostic'
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_diabetic: PASS - POST /scan with 'diabetic' detects severity='high', category='diagnostic'
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_we_guarantee: PASS - POST /scan with 'we guarantee' detects severity='high', category='guarantee'
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_i_promise: PASS - POST /scan with 'I promise' detects severity='high', category='guarantee'
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_i_think: PASS - POST /scan with 'I think' detects category='opinion' at low severity
verified_features.LIABILITY_scan_in_my_opinion: PASS - POST /scan with 'In my opinion' detects category='opinion' at medium severity
verified_features.LIABILITY_sanitize_privacy: PASS - POST /sanitize replaces PII with [redacted], returns original_length/sanitized_length
verified_features.LIABILITY_sanitize_diagnostic: PASS - POST /sanitize replaces medical info with [medical-note-see-profile]
verified_features.LIABILITY_sanitize_idempotent: PASS - Scanning sanitized output returns severity <= original severity
verified_features.LIABILITY_log_audit_entries: PASS - GET /log returns audit entries with severity, categories, finding_count, timestamp. NO text content stored (only text_length)
verified_features.LIABILITY_summary_counts: PASS - GET /summary returns total_scans, by_severity{none,low,medium,high}, blocked_count (equals high count)
verified_features.LIABILITY_findings_structure: PASS - findings[] contains {category, severity, match, span:[start,end], suggestion}
verified_features.SCHEDULE_gaps_required_fields: PASS - GET /gaps returns open_slot_count, premium_open, non_premium_open, exposure_score, by_hour[], premium_hours=[10,11,14,15,17,18]
verified_features.SCHEDULE_premium_slots: PASS - GET /premium-slots returns total_premium_slots, filled, open, fill_rate (0..1), protection_status (tight|ok|exposed), open_slots_sample (max 12)
verified_features.SCHEDULE_upsell: PASS - GET /upsell returns recommendations[] with booking_id, guest, current{id,name,price}, suggested{id,name,price}, uplift_usd>0, rationale. Sorted by uplift desc. Contains potential_revenue
verified_features.SCHEDULE_rebalance: PASS - GET /rebalance returns moves[] with from_therapist, to_therapist, compatible_categories, suggestion + under_requested_therapists[] + over/under_utilized_count
verified_features.SCHEDULE_recommendations: PASS - GET /recommendations returns prioritized actions[] with {kind, severity, title, action}. Count >= 1. Summary includes open_slots, premium_open, upsell_potential, rebalance_moves
verified_features.SECURITY_no_id_leak_liability: PASS - No _id field leaked in liability log
verified_features.SECURITY_no_id_leak_schedule: PASS - No _id field leaked in any spa-schedule endpoint

seed_data_creation: Used existing spa demo data from /api/spa-ops/seed-demo (therapists, rooms, bookings, services). No new test data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 141 adds two major modules: (1) CONCIERGE LIABILITY FILTER - 5 endpoints at /api/echo-concierge/liability/. Deterministic rule-based scanner (no LLM) with 6 categories: privacy (email/phone/CC/SSN), diagnostic (medical claims), defamation (stole/scammer/drunk), harassment (appearance-based), guarantee (promises), opinion (I think/in my opinion). Severity levels: none/low/medium/high. High severity ALWAYS blocks save (ok_to_save=false, requires_manager_approval=true). Sanitization replaces risky spans with category-specific placeholders ([redacted], [objective-rewrite-needed], [medical-note-see-profile], [hr-only], [soft-language], [opinion-removed]). Audit log stores metadata only (text_length, not raw text). (2) SPA SCHEDULE INTELLIGENCE - 5 endpoints at /api/spa-schedule/. Action-oriented scheduling recommendations. Premium hours: 10,11,14,15,17,18. Exposure score formula: premium*3 + non_premium. Protection status: tight (>80% fill), ok (>50%), exposed (<50%). Upsell rules map service categories to upgrade suggestions. Rebalance suggests therapist reassignments based on utilization (>85% over, <35% under). Recommendations endpoint combines all signals into prioritized actions. All endpoints accept optional ?date=YYYY-MM-DD parameter.
